title: 3Powers per-integration model catalog (models.yaml)
description: Editable data (not code): the per-integration model/label choices `3pwr init` and `3pwr config roles setup` offer. A model not listed stays selectable via free-form entry.

integrations.description: Integration name -> its catalog of offered models.

default.description: Model id offered as the documented default (empty for any-model backends).

models.description: The offered models for this integration.

family.description: Model family (used by the diversity precheck).
